name: Cran-Apple Crisp
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2 Coat an 8-inch square baking pan with nonstick cooking spray.
3 In a small bowl, combine oats, brown sugar, margarine, flour, and salt. Stir well and set aside.
4 Whisk together sugar, cinnamon, and cornstarch in a separate bowl.
5 Add the apples and cranberries to the dry mixture; toss well.
6 Pour the fruit mixture into the prepared pan and sprinkle the oat topping evenly over the top.
7 Bake for 35 to 45 minutes, or until the fruit is hot and bubbly and the oats are nicely browned.
